title: Penrith Family Cuts Bills 78% with 8.8 kW + Powerwall
sum: Four-bedroom home on time-of-use tariff paired tier-one panels with Tesla Powerwall 3.
body: The Harrington family faced summer bills exceeding $620 per quarter on Ausgrid time-of-use.
Sunterra installed 22× 400 W REC Alpha Pure panels (8.8 kW) with Tesla Powerwall 3. STCs reduced upfront cost by $2,680.
Twelve months post-commissioning, grid imports fell 78%. Self-consumption reached 71%.

title: Adelaide Warehouse Saves $48k on Demand Charges
sum: Commercial array targeting peak demand between 2–8 PM on SAPN business tariff.
body: A logistics operator paid significant demand charges on their SAPN business tariff.
Sunterra engineered a 99 kW rooftop system with Sungrow inverters and export limiting per DNSP requirements.
Year-one savings: $48,200 AUD with 3.9-year simple payback after STCs and depreciation.

title: Off-Grid Property Near Noosa
sum: Hybrid solar-diesel-battery for rural property outside Ergon grid extension.
body: 12 kW ground-mount with 30 kWh lithium and backup diesel gen-set replaced nightly generator runs.
Zone 2 irradiance delivers strong winter performance. CEC-compliant islanding protects onsite machinery.

title: Melbourne Strata Adds Shared Solar
sum: Solar Victoria battery rebate stacked with STCs for six townhouses.
body: Six-unit strata shared roof space with individual smart meters and Solar Victoria eligibility verified.

title: Perth Retail Strip Tenancy Solar
sum: Synergy tariff optimisation with west-facing tilt for afternoon load matching.
body: West-facing tilt maximised generation during retail peak hours. Western Power approval in 10 business days.
